meaning: World Food Program(me)(联合国)世界粮食计划署
examples: Officials of the World Food Programme, WFP, say they are receiving information that famine has gripped parts of central Afghanistan.
WFP officials say existing food stocks in the area are exhausted and an emergency effort will be launched to bring wheat and potatoes into the area.
North Star was founded in 2006 by the international post and parcel delivery company TNT, with support from the United Nations World Food Programme (WFP).
This means only providing aid when members of the WFP can monitor its distribution.
This summer the WFP was feeding 44% of the state's population of about 500, 000.
